steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate and present project state to researcher.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured discussion with researcher on rescoping t0023 around answering RQ1/2/4/5.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Cancel t0023, write 5 correction files, create t0025 task scaffold.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, run verificators, push, PR, merge.
